rationale: The citing paper uses Howell, Ebbes, and Liechty (2021) only as a background example that fatigue or disengagement can produce random responses in repeated tasks. It appears in a parenthetical literature citation in the theory section and again in an appendix robustness-check discussion, without a distinct role in hypothesis development beyond generic context. The citing study does not apply or build on the cited paper's screening model, estimation framework, or managerial decision-bias analysis.
